category_sources: source_facts.description says iodine tunnels IPv4 traffic through a DNS server; official code.kryo.se page says iodine lets you tunnel IPv4 data through a DNS server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is iodine; official code.kryo.se project page uses iodine.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official iodine project page; official page links to README and man page documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/yarrick/iodine, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IPv4-over-DNS tunneling; official code.kryo.se page describes DNS tunnel behavior, supported platforms, and TUN/TAP requirements.
